commit.message:
Add simplified payment flow guide

New simplified workflow:
1. User clicks 'Book a Session'
2. Payment modal opens
3. Choose UPI (₹1200) or PayPal (5)
4. Payment processed
5. Redirect to cal.com for scheduling

This replaces complex booking database system with simple:
Payment → Calendar redirect

Exact HTML/CSS/JavaScript code included - just copy-paste into index.html

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add finalizers to Record (#4)

* Add finalizers and DeletionTimestamp to Record

- Remove unused UID field from ObjectMeta
- Rename DeletedAt -> DeletionTimestamp (was never wired through storage)
- Add Finalizers []string to ObjectMeta and storage.Row
- Add DeletionTimestamp *time.Time to storage.Row
- Add IsTerminating() helper on ObjectMeta
- Add storage.ErrTerminating sentinel

This is the foundational layer for the finalizer state machine; service
and storage CRUD changes follow in subsequent commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Implement finalizer state machine

- SQLite: add finalizers/deletion_timestamp columns, add optimistic
  locking (resource_version in UPDATE WHERE clause)
- Postgres: add finalizers/deletion_timestamp to all CRUD queries,
  add migration 0003_finalizers.sql
- Service: Delete soft-deletes via optimistic-lock Update (race-safe),
  Update guards against adding finalizers to terminating records and
  auto-triggers hard-delete when last finalizer is removed
- Proto: add finalizers + deletion_timestamp fields to ObjectMeta
- Server: map new proto fields, map ErrTerminating → FailedPrecondition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clarify IsTerminating docstring and add unit tests

commit.message:
test: cover MockFs::exists short-circuit branch in cleanup.rs

Add test mock_fs_exists_returns_true_for_dir to exercise the
`dirs.contains_key(path)` true branch of the `||` expression in
MockFs::exists (cleanup.rs:124). Previously only the false branch
(evaluate `files.contains`) was covered; the short-circuit path was
never hit because existing tests only inserted paths into `files`.

Branch coverage for cleanup.rs: 94.44% → 100%
Overall branch coverage: 93.45% → 93.50%

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add static file serving - backend now serves index.html

Added static file middleware to serve frontend from backend:
- Serves index.html from /public folder
- Intelligently routes: API requests get JSON, browser gets HTML
- Root endpoint (/) now detects content type and responds accordingly
- All API endpoints (/api/*) still work as before

This allows:
- Frontend to be served from same backend (Render)
- OR frontend deployed separately (Netlify) still works
- Flexible deployment options

Created /public folder with index.html inside.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix Playwright: use standard browser path, add node-based CLI install

The PlaywrightRunner's browser install was failing because:
1. The pwsh script approach was broken (missing DLL)
2. The custom browsers path didn't check the standard ms-playwright location

Fixes:
- GetPlaywrightBrowsersPath() now checks standard ms-playwright first
- EnsureBrowsersInstalledAsync() tries node-based CLI (most reliable)
- Added FindNodePlaywrightCli() to discover node/cli.js from build output

Tested: standalone Blazor app + Playwright test passes with screenshots
and video recording confirmed working.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[WIP] Fix entity identity issues with ObjectId and upsert behavior (#53)

* Initial plan

* Changes before error encountered

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ythril-network/Ythril/sessions/ae9f6b9a-d34a-4050-b5a4-0cbc85aa2acc

Co-authored-by: MetalMMagic <118023869+MetalMMagic@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: entity identity model — UUID-only IDs, ID-based upsert, no ghost stubs from remember

Defect 1: All write paths now generate UUID v4 (never ObjectId). Supplied IDs
are validated against UUID v4 regex and rejected with 400 if invalid.

Defect 2: upsertEntity uses _id as identity. With id → update by _id (or
insert with that _id). Without id → always insert new record. Name is a
non-unique searchable label.

Defect 3: remember no longer auto-creates ghost type:entity stubs. Entity names
are resolved via findEntitiesByName (no type constraint). Unresolved names
produce warnings; multiple matches link to all and warn.

Also adjusts bulk_write endpoints from main merge to use new identity model.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ythril-network/Ythril/sessions/e8eb3515-1335-459b-992d-61fbe30b3cd4

Co-authored-by: MetalMMagic <118023869+MetalMMagic@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: MetalMMagic <118023869+MetalMMagic@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Bulk write API for entities, edges, memories, and chrono entries (#48)

* Initial plan

* feat: add bulk write API for entities, edges, memories, and chrono entries

- Add POST /api/brain/spaces/:spaceId/bulk REST endpoint
  - Processes in order: memories → entities → edges → chrono
  - Per-item validation errors reported in errors[] without aborting batch
  - Returns { inserted, updated, errors } with counts per type
  - Capped at 500 entries per type
  - Proxy space support via ?targetSpace query param

- Add bulk_write MCP tool in mcp/router.ts
  - Same four arrays as REST API
  - Added to MUTATING_TOOLS set (blocked for read-only tokens)
  - Returns summary with inserted/updated/error counts

- Add integration tests in testing/integration/brain.test.js
  - 207 response with correct shape
  - Insert vs update tracking for entities/edges
  - Cross-type batch (entities created before edges)
  - Per-item validation errors don't abort batch
  - Empty body/arrays no-op
  - 404 for unknown space, 401 without auth

- Update docs/integration-guide.md with new endpoint and MCP tool

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ythril-network/Ythril/sessions/d016c46d-c3c0-427e-8802-5f24daa46a8c

commit.message:
Fix search bar tap-through on mobile: z-index stacking

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Top 5 performance optimizations from audit

1. Pathfinding: cache off-road edges at world gen (O(n²) → O(1) per call),
   binary heap Dijkstra (O(V²) → O((V+E)logV)), path result caching

2. Expand _tickCache: add eliteMerchants[], merchantsByKingdom[]. Replace
   20+ world.people.filter() calls in kingdom/tax/military tick with cache
   lookups (soldiers, citizens, EMs, merchants)

3. Replace all 122 JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) with structuredClone()
   in serialization and throughout player.js (2-3x faster deep clones)

4. Convert O(n) includes()/indexOf()/find() to O(1) Set.has() in daily
   tick: satQuitters, wage quitters, employee validation, guild seizure,
   grace period cleanup. Also fix financialLedger shift() → splice()

5. UI: reduce auto-refresh from 1s to 3s with dirty-flag day-change
   detection for immediate refresh when needed. Export markPanelDirty()

Bonus: incremental _militarySalesTotal counter replaces daily tradeLog scan

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(aks-gitops-platform): add Kyverno and Secrets Store CSI Driver to platform

Install two new cluster-wide tools via Helm in platform.tf:

- Kyverno (section 8): policy engine for K8s (validate/mutate/generate).
  All four controllers (admission, background, cleanup, reports) configured
  with spot tolerations to schedule on the user node pool.

- Secrets Store CSI Driver (section 9): mounts Azure KV secrets as pod
  volumes and optionally syncs them as Kubernetes Secret objects.
  Spot tolerations on both the DaemonSet driver and the Azure provider.
  syncSecret.enabled=true and enableSecretRotation=true enabled.
  Azure provider installed separately (csi-secrets-store-provider-azure)
  and configured to use the platform MI (kubelet identity) via IMDS.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: prepare 1.0.1 release

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Feature/tls auth (#3)

* feat: add TLS/mTLS authentication and core/v1/User type

- New pkg/auth package: NewServerTLSConfig builds a *tls.Config from
  PEM cert/key files; when a CA file is supplied it switches to mTLS
  (RequireAndVerifyClientCert). ServerCredentials wraps this as gRPC
  TransportCredentials. UnaryInterceptor / StreamInterceptor extract
  the verified client certificate CN and inject an auth.Identity into
  the request context via auth.FromContext.

- cmd/server: three new flags (-cert, -key, -ca). When cert+key are
  present the server runs with TLS; adding -ca enables mTLS so every
  client must present a certificate signed by the given CA. A warning
  is logged when running in plaintext mode.

- pkg/validator: registers core/v1/User as a hardcoded core type
  (ScopeGlobal). Spec requires a commonName field that must match the
  TLS client certificate Subject.CN; optional roles and description
  fields are also accepted.

- scripts/gen-certs.sh: helper that generates a CA, a server cert with
  localhost/127.0.0.1 SANs, and a sample client cert (CN=alice) for
  local development and testing.

- pkg/auth/tls_test.go: unit tests covering TLS config construction,
  mTLS config, error paths, and identity extraction from a synthesised
  peer context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: remove roles from core/v1/User type

Roles will be added later when implementing RBAC. For now, the User
type only stores commonName and description.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add SOC log probe for Air1601/CCM4211

Air1601 firmware buffers log output internally and requires a
CMD_GET_BASE_INFO probe frame on the debug UART before it starts
sending log data.

- Add build_log_probe() public API to ccm4211 module
- Extend stream_binary() with optional init_data parameter
- Add --probe flag to 'log view-binary' command
- Flash test auto-sends probe for air1601/ccm4211 chips
- Flash test uses SocLogDecoder for binary log chips

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: classify 402 errors as billing/balance issue using HTTP status code

classifyError now accepts the HTTP status code in addition to body text.
402 → 'Insufficient account balance', 401 → 'Invalid API key',
429 → 'Rate limit exceeded'. Also added 'insufficient/balance/credit'
keyword matching for billing errors.

Strengthen harness orchestration contracts
